nonGoals: Do NOT implement wordCount, truncateWords, barrel exports, or tests
objective: Create the `normalizeText` pure function — collapses all whitespace runs to a single space, trims, returns "" for empty/whitespace-only input. Heavy JSDoc following the `chunk-text.ts` pattern.
planText: Create `apps/web/src/lib/text-utilities/normalize-text.ts` with a single named export `normalizeText(text: string): string`. Implementation: replace all whitespace runs (`/\s+/g`) with a single space, then `.trim()`. Return `""` when the result is empty or input is only whitespace. Add JSDoc block with `@param`, `@returns`, `@example` matching the style in `apps/web/src/lib/chunk-text.ts`.

nonGoals: Do NOT create the barrel index.ts or test file in this deliverable
objective: Create `wordCount` and `truncateWords` pure functions, each importing `normalizeText` from deliverable 0. Both follow the `chunk-text.ts` JSDoc pattern.
planText: 1. Create `word-count.ts`: import `normalizeText` from `./normalize-text`. Export `wordCount(text: string): number`. Implementation: normalize the input, if result is `""` return `0`, otherwise split on spaces and return the length. JSDoc with `@param`, `@returns`, `@example`. 2. Create `truncate-words.ts`: import `normalizeText` from `./normalize-text`. Export `truncateWords(text: string, maxWords: number): string`. Implementation: normalize the input. If `maxWords <= 0` or normalized is `""`, return `""`. Split on spaces. If word count <= maxWords, return the normalized text unchanged (no ellipsis). Otherwise join the first maxWords words with spaces and append `…`. JSDoc with `@param`, `@returns`, `@example`.

nonGoals: Do NOT modify any files outside `apps/web/src/lib/text-utilities/`
Do NOT wire these utilities into synthesis, SSML, or any other module
Do NOT refactor `chunk-text.ts` or any existing code
objective: Create barrel `index.ts` re-exporting all three functions, and a comprehensive `index.test.ts` Vitest suite covering every acceptance-criteria edge case.
planText: 1. Create `index.ts`: barrel that re-exports `normalizeText`, `wordCount`, and `truncateWords` from their respective files. 2. Create `index.test.ts`: Vitest suite importing from `./index` (or directly from each source file). Structure with `describe` blocks per function, `it` blocks per edge case, explicit imports from `vitest` (`describe`, `it`, `expect`). Cover: (a) normalizeText — empty string, whitespace-only, leading/trailing spaces, multiple internal spaces, tabs/newlines, mixed whitespace; (b) wordCount — empty, whitespace-only, single word, multiple words with varied whitespace, newlines; (c) truncateWords — maxWords=0, maxWords negative, empty text, whitespace-only text, fewer words than max (no ellipsis), exactly maxWords (no ellipsis), more words (ellipsis appended). Run `npm run test` to confirm all pass.
